tagline: La marca tiene una base aprovechable; el mayor valor esta en convertir senales en sistema.
brand_descriptor: Las fuentes muestran senales utiles, pero el sistema debe separar identidad, percepcion visual, narrativa y conversion para operar con precision.

logo_system.primary: Use current primary logo as the main recognition asset.
logo_system.icon: Use or derive a simplified symbol from the most recognizable brand mark.

typography.usage: Use strong hierarchy for titles and restrained supporting text for details.

brand_tone.name: Diferenciacion
brand_tone.description: Convertir atributos genericos en codigos propietarios: rituales, lenguaje, visuales y experiencia.

brand_tone.name: Premium confidence
brand_tone.description: Sound curated, specific, and operational rather than generic.

applications.name: Digital presence
applications.description: Apply the identity consistently across website, social profile, and sales material.

applications.name: Client proposal
applications.description: Translate the identity into offer pages, highlights, and proof points.

instagram_style.description: Demostrar criterio, metodo y dominio de la categoria.
Convertir el destino o servicio en una experiencia deseable, no solo en itinerario.
Reducir incertidumbre con evidencia, casos, testimonios y proceso.
Guiar al publico hacia consulta, reserva, compra o diagnostico.

benefits.name: Sharper perception
benefits.description: Help the audience understand the value faster.

benefits.name: Reusable system
benefits.description: Turn scattered ideas into rules that can guide future assets.
